projectDescription: A fast, memory-efficient exact attention library for PyTorch that achieves significant speedups over standard attention through IO-aware CUDA kernel design, supporting NVIDIA (Ampere, Hopper, Blackwell) and AMD ROCm GPUs.
keyFeatures: IO-aware tiling algorithm that avoids materialization of the NxN attention matrix
Linear memory complexity vs quadratic in standard attention
Support for causal masking, sliding window (local) attention, and ALiBi
Multi-query attention (MQA) and grouped-query attention (GQA) support
KV cache inference with paged attention (PagedAttention-compatible)
FP16 and BF16 support with FP8 forward on select architectures
FlashAttention-3 beta optimized for Hopper (H100) GPUs
FlashAttention-4 (CuTeDSL) for Hopper and Blackwell GPUs
AMD ROCm support via Composable Kernel (CK) and Triton backends
Rotary embeddings, softcapping, deterministic backward pass
Flexible score_mod and mask_mod for custom attention patterns (FA4)
publicApiSurface: flash_attn_func(q, k, v, dropout_p, softmax_scale, causal, window_size, alibi_slopes, deterministic)
flash_attn_qkvpacked_func(qkv, dropout_p, softmax_scale, causal, window_size, alibi_slopes, deterministic)
flash_attn_kvpacked_func(q, kv, dropout_p, softmax_scale, causal, window_size, alibi_slopes, deterministic)
flash_attn_varlen_func(q, k, v, cu_seqlens_q, cu_seqlens_k, max_seqlen_q, max_seqlen_k, ...)
flash_attn_with_kvcache(q, k_cache, v_cache, k, v, rotary_cos, rotary_sin, cache_seqlens, ...)
flash_attn.cute.flash_attn_func(q, k, v, causal, window_size_left, window_size_right, score_mod, mask_mod, ...)
